title: Excel PRO Automation
description: Excel'da professional darajaga chiqing. Advanced formulalar, Dashboard PRO, VBA va ChatGPT bilan avtomatlashtirish.
objectives: Dynamic formulalar bilan ishlash (FILTER, UNIQUE, SORT)

content.text: SUMPRODUCT — bir nechta diapazonlarni ko'paytirib, yig'indini topadi. U IF, COUNTIF, SUMIF ning kombinatsiyasini bitta formulada qila oladi.

content.code:
=SUMPRODUCT(A2:A10, B2:B10)
→ A2*B2 + A3*B3 + ... + A10*B10

=SUMPRODUCT((A2:A10="Olma")*B2:B10)
→ A da 'Olma' bo'lganda B yig'indisi (SUMIF kabi)

=SUMPRODUCT((A2:A10="Olma")*(C2:C10>100)*B2:B10)
→ Ko'p shartli yig'indi (SUMIFS kabi)

content.text: INDIRECT - matn ko'rinishida yozilgan katak manzilini real manzilga aylantiradi.

content.code:
=INDIRECT("A1")     → A1 qiymatini qaytaradi
=INDIRECT("A" & 5)   → A5 qiymatini qaytaradi
=INDIRECT("Sheet2!A1") → Sheet2 dagi A1

=SUM(INDIRECT("A1:A" & B1))
→ A1 dan A(B1 qiymati) gacha yig'indi

=TEXTJOIN(", ", TRUE, A1:A5)
→ "Ali, Vali, Gulnora, Sardor, Aziza"

=CONCATENATE(A1, " ", B1)
→ A1 va B1 ni probel bilan birlashtiradi

=A1 & " " & B1
→ Yuqoridagi bilan bir xil (& operatori)

formulas.name: INDIRECT (dinamik)
formulas.description: B1 dagi raqamga qarab A ustunidagi katakni topish

formulas.name: TEXTJOIN
formulas.description: Bo'sh kataklarni o'tkazib, vergul bilan birlashtirish

questions.question: SUMPRODUCT nima qiladi?
questions.explanation: SUMPRODUCT diapazonlarni element-element ko'paytirib, natijalarni yig'adi.

questions.question: INDIRECT("A1") nimani qaytaradi?
questions.explanation: INDIRECT matn ko'rinishidagi manzilni real katakka aylantiradi.

questions.question: TEXTJOIN ning afzalligi nimada?
questions.explanation: TEXTJOIN ning ikkinchi argumenti TRUE bo'lsa, bo'sh kataklarni e'tiborga olmaydi.

questions.question: LEFT("Excel", 3) natijasi?
questions.explanation: LEFT chap tomondan berilgan sonda belgi oladi: "Exc".

lessons.title: SUMIF + IF Combinations
lessons.description: SUMIF va IF ni birga ishlatish — kuchli kombinatsiyalar

content.text: Ba'zan murakkab muammolarni hal qilish uchun bir nechta funksiyalarni birlashtirib ishlatish kerak bo'ladi.

content.code:
=IF(SUMIF(A:A, "Olma", B:B) > 1000,
    "Ko'p sotildi",
    "Kam sotildi")

→ Agar Olma sotuvi 1000 dan ko'p bo'lsa, "Ko'p sotildi"
  aks holda "Kam sotildi"

content.text: IFERROR formulaga xato bersa, sizning xohlagan matningizni ko'rsatadi.

content.code:
=IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A1, B:C, 2, FALSE), "Topilmadi")
=IFERROR(A1/B1, 0)  ← Nolga bo'lish xatosini hal qiladi
=IFERROR(formula, "")  ← Bo'sh qaytaradi

=IF(SUMIF(A:A, B1, C:C) > 10000000,
    SUMIF(A:A, B1, C:C) * 0.1,
    IF(SUMIF(A:A, B1, C:C) > 5000000,
        SUMIF(A:A, B1, C:C) * 0.05,
        0))

→ Xodim sotuvi:
  10M dan ko'p — 10% bonus
  5M dan ko'p — 5% bonus
  Aks holda — 0

content.text: Bunday murakkab formulalarni yordamchi ustunlarga bo'lib yozish o'qish va tahrirlashni osonlashtiradi.

questions.question: IFERROR nima qiladi?
questions.explanation: IFERROR formuladagi xato bo'lsa, ikkinchi argumentdagi qiymatni qaytaradi.

questions.question: Nested IF maksimal nechta darajada bo'lishi mumkin?
questions.explanation: Excel'da nested IF maksimum 7 darajada bo'lishi mumkin (eski versiyalarda).

questions.question: Bo'lish xatosini (#DIV/0!) qanday hal qilish mumkin?
questions.explanation: Ikkala usul ham ishlaydi: IFERROR yoki IF orqali tekshirish.

content.code:
=XLOOKUP(qidirish, qidirish_diapazoni, qaytarish_diapazoni,
         [agar_topilmasa], [moslik_turi], [qidirish_yo'nalishi])

5-argument (match_mode):
  0 — Aniq (default)
  -1 — Aniq yoki keyingi kichkina
  1  — Aniq yoki keyingi katta
  2  — Wildcards (*, ?)

6-argument (search_mode):
  1  — Birinchidan oxirgisi (default)
  -1 — Oxirgidan birinchisi
  2  — Binary (saralangan A→Z)
  -2 — Binary (saralangan Z→A)

=XLOOKUP("*Ali*", A:A, B:B, "", 2)
→ "Ali" so'zi bor istalgan matnni topadi

=XLOOKUP("A??", A:A, B:B, "", 2)
→ A bilan boshlanib, 3 ta belgili matn (A01, A99, ...)

=XLOOKUP(B1, A:A, C:C, "-", 0, -1)
→ Oxirgi mos kelgan qiymatni topadi (oldingi emas)

Bu xodimning oxirgi sotuvini topishda foydali

content.text: XMATCH — element diapazonda nechanchi o'rinda turganini qaytaradi.

content.code:
=XMATCH("Olma", A:A)
→ A ustunida 'Olma' nechanchi qatorda

=INDEX(C:C, XMATCH(B1, A:A))
→ XLOOKUP ga muqobil

=XLOOKUP(B1, A2:A10, XLOOKUP(B2, B1:Z1, B2:Z10))

→ Bir vaqtda qator va ustun bo'yicha qidirish
→ INDEX-MATCH-MATCH ga muqobil

questions.question: XLOOKUP da wildcards uchun nechinchi argument?
questions.explanation: 5-argument (match_mode) ni 2 ga qo'ying — wildcards ishlaydi.

questions.question: Oxirgi mos kelgan qiymatni topish uchun search_mode?
questions.explanation: search_mode = -1 → oxirgidan birinchisi tomon qidiradi.

questions.question: XMATCH nima qaytaradi?
questions.explanation: XMATCH element nechanchi o'rinda turganini sondan qaytaradi.

questions.question: * va ? qaerda ishlatiladi?
questions.explanation: * — istalgan miqdor belgi, ? — bitta belgi (wildcards).

lessons.title: Dynamic Formulas
lessons.description: Excel 365 ning yangi dinamik massiv formulalari

content.text: Excel 365 da yangi 'Dynamic Arrays' funksiyalari paydo bo'ldi. Ular bitta formuladan ko'p natija qaytarib, kataklarni avtomatik to'ldiradi (Spill).
Spill — formula natijalari avtomatik ravishda boshqa kataklarga 'to'kiladi'. Agar joy band bo'lsa #SPILL! xatosi chiqadi.

content.code:
=FILTER(diapazon, shart, [agar_bo'sh])

=FILTER(A2:C100, B2:B100>1000)
→ B 1000 dan katta bo'lgan barcha qatorlar

=FILTER(A2:C100, (B2:B100="Olma")*(C2:C100>100))
→ Ikki shart: B='Olma' VA C>100

=FILTER(A2:C100, (B2:B100="Olma")+(B2:B100="Banan"))
→ B='Olma' YOKI B='Banan' (+ = OR)

=UNIQUE(A2:A100)
→ Faqat takrorlanmas qiymatlar

=UNIQUE(A2:A100, FALSE, TRUE)
→ Faqat 1 marta uchragan qiymatlar (unique only)

=SORT(UNIQUE(A2:A100))
→ Takrorlanmas va saralangan

=SORT(A2:C100, 2, -1)
→ 2-ustun bo'yicha kamayuvchi tartibda saralash

=SORTBY(A2:A100, B2:B100, -1, C2:C100, 1)
→ A ustunini B (kamayuvchi) va C (o'suvchi) bo'yicha

=SEQUENCE(10)        → 1, 2, 3, ..., 10
=SEQUENCE(5, 3)      → 5 qator, 3 ustun
=SEQUENCE(10, 1, 100, 5)  → 100, 105, 110, 115, ...

=SEQUENCE(12,1,DATE(2025,1,1),31)
→ Har oyning 1-sanasi 2025-yil

Agar D1 da: =UNIQUE(A:A)
Natijalar D1, D2, D3, ... ga to'kiladi (spill)

Boshqa joyda: =D1#  ← Butun spill diapazoniga murojaat
=COUNTA(D1#)  ← Spill dagi elementlar soni

questions.question: Spill nima?
questions.explanation: Spill — Dynamic Array formulalari natijalarini avtomatik ravishda boshqa kataklarga to'kishi.

questions.question: FILTER da OR sharti qanday yoziladi?
questions.explanation: + operatori OR ma'nosida ishlaydi (Array formulasi sifatida).

questions.question: UNIQUE qaysi versiyadan?
questions.explanation: UNIQUE va boshqa Dynamic Arrays — Microsoft 365 dan boshlab.

questions.question: D1# nimani anglatadi?
questions.explanation: # operatori D1 da boshlanadigan spill diapazoniga murojaat qiladi.

content.text: Order Management — buyurtmalarni qabul qilish, kuzatish va boshqarish jarayoni. Excel'da bunday tizimni yaratish biznes uchun juda foydali.

content.code:
A: Order ID    (avtomatik: ORD-001, ORD-002...)
B: Sana       (TODAY() yoki manual)
C: Mijoz      (Customers ro'yxatidan dropdown)
D: Mahsulot   (Products ro'yxatidan dropdown)
E: Soni       (manual)
F: Narxi      (avtomatik: VLOOKUP)
G: Summa      (avtomatik: E*F)
H: Status     (Pending/Done/Cancelled)
I: Izoh       (qo'shimcha)

Order ID avtomatik:
="ORD-" & TEXT(ROW()-1, "000")

Narxi (mahsulot katalogidan):
=IFERROR(VLOOKUP(D2, Products!A:B, 2, FALSE), 0)

Summa:
=E2*F2

Mijoz ma'lumotlari:
=VLOOKUP(C2, Customers!A:D, 2, FALSE)  ← Telefon
=VLOOKUP(C2, Customers!A:D, 3, FALSE)  ← Manzil

Status uchun Data Validation:
  Pending / In Progress / Done / Cancelled

Conditional Formatting:
  Pending  → Sariq
  Done     → Yashil
  Cancelled → Qizil

Status bo'yicha hisoblash:
=COUNTIF(H:H, "Done")     ← Tugallangan
=SUMIFS(G:G, H:H, "Done") ← Tugallanganlar summasi

Jami buyurtmalar:    =COUNTA(A2:A1000)-1
Jami summa:          =SUM(G:G)
O'rtacha buyurtma:   =AVERAGE(G2:G1000)

Bugungi buyurtmalar: =COUNTIFS(B:B, TODAY())
Bu oylik summa:      =SUMIFS(G:G, B:B, ">="&EOMONTH(TODAY(),-1)+1)

Eng ko'p sotilgan:
=INDEX(D:D, MATCH(MAX(COUNTIF(D:D,D:D)), COUNTIF(D:D,D:D), 0))

questions.question: Order ID ni avtomatik yaratish uchun?
questions.explanation: TEXT funksiyasi bilan format berib, ROW dan foydalanish eng yaxshi yo'l.

questions.question: Status uchun dropdown qanday qilinadi?
questions.explanation: Data Validation → List orqali dropdown menyu yaratiladi.

questions.question: Conditional Formatting nima uchun?
questions.explanation: Conditional Formatting shart asosida kataklarni rang/format bilan ajratadi.

lessons.title: Project Data Processing
lessons.description: Katta hajmdagi ma'lumotlarni samarali qayta ishlash

content.text: Power Query — Excel'ning kuchli vositasi bo'lib, turli manbalardan ma'lumotlarni olish, tozalash va o'zgartirishga imkon beradi.

content.code:
Power Query yaratganingizdan keyin:

• Asosiy fayl o'zgarsa - Refresh tugma
• Avtomatik refresh - Connection Properties
• Har necha daqiqada yangilanadi
• Fayl ochilganda yangilash

Shortcut: Alt + F5 (joriy query)
         Ctrl + Alt + F5 (hammasi)

content.text: Power Query bilan 1 marotaba sozlangan jarayon avtomatik takrorlanadi. Bu vaqtni juda tejaydi!

content.code:
Boshlang'ich:
  ' Ali ', '25', '01-Yan-2025'
  'Vali','30','15.02.2025'
  '  Gulnora','28', '2025/03/20'

Tozalashdan keyin:
  Ali, 25, 01/01/2025
  Vali, 30, 15/02/2025
  Gulnora, 28, 20/03/2025

Amallar:
  1. Trim (probellarni olib tashlash)
  2. Text → Number
  3. Sana formatini unifikatsiya

examples.title: Hisobot avtomatlashtirish
examples.description: Har oyda yangi fayl qo'shilganda hisobot avtomatik yangilanadi

questions.question: Power Query qaerda joylashgan?
questions.explanation: Power Query — Data tab ostida 'Get & Transform Data' bo'limida.

questions.question: Bir nechta fayldan ma'lumot olish uchun?
options: Get Data → From File → From Folder
questions.explanation: From Folder — papkadagi barcha fayllarni avtomatik birlashtiradi.

questions.question: Merge va Append farqi?
questions.explanation: Merge — ustunlarni qo'shadi (JOIN), Append — qatorlarni qo'shadi (UNION).

content.text: Professional Dashboard — bu nafaqat chiroyli, balki funktsional, tez ishlaydigan va aniq xulosalar beradigan vosita.
Hech qachon Dashboard sheetda asosiy ma'lumotni saqlamang! Alohida 'Data' sheet yarating.

content.code:
1. Katakni katta qiling (merge cells)
2. Katta font ishlatang (24-48pt)
3. Asosiy raqam yuqori
4. Qisqa label pastida
5. Trend ikoncha (↑↓) yoki rangli matn

Misol:
  💰 12.5M UZS
  Jami sotuv ↑ 15%

Insert → Sparklines:
  • Line — chiziqli trend
  • Column — ustunli
  • Win/Loss — yutuq/yo'qotish

Katak ichida ishlaydi (joy kam, ma'lumot ko'p)
O'lcham: 1 katak, 1 satr

PivotTable Analyze → Insert Slicer

• Bir nechta Pivot ga ulaymiz
• Mouse bilan tanlaymiz
• Bir nechta Slicer = AND mantiqi
• Kunlik filter uchun Timeline

Dashboard interaktivligi 100%

content.text: Yaxshi dashboard - 5 sekundda asosiy xulosani bera oladigan dashboard.

questions.question: Dashboard nechta qatlamdan iborat?
questions.explanation: Data → Calculation → Presentation — 3 qatlam.

questions.question: Sparkline qayerda joylashadi?
questions.explanation: Sparkline — katak ichidagi mini grafik.

questions.question: Bir nechta Pivot ga bitta Slicer qanday ulanadi?
questions.explanation: Slicer-ga right-click → Report Connections orqali bir nechta Pivot ga ulanadi.

questions.question: Yaxshi dashboard nechta rangdan iborat?
questions.explanation: Professional dashboard 3-4 ta asosiy rangdan iborat bo'ladi.

lessons.title: Interactive Dashboard
lessons.description: Tugmalar, dropdownlar va interaktiv elementlar bilan dashboard

content.text: Foydalanuvchi tugmalarni bosib, dropdownlarni o'zgartirib, dashboardni o'zi sozlay oladigan dashboard.
Developer tab ko'rinmasa: File → Options → Customize Ribbon → Developer ni belgilang.

content.code:
Misol:
  Combo Box ulangan A1 ga
  Ro'yxat: 'Olma', 'Banan', 'Apelsin'
  Tanlanganda A1 da raqam paydo bo'ladi (1, 2, 3)

Formula:
  =INDEX({"Olma","Banan","Apelsin"}, A1)
  =CHOOSE(A1, SUM(B:B), AVERAGE(B:B), MAX(B:B))

Combo Box → Cell Link: A1

Chart data:
  Yordamchi diapazon (D1:D10):
  =CHOOSE($A$1, B1, C1, D1)

Natija: Combo Box o'zgarsa, chart ham o'zgaradi!

Goal Seek misoli:
  A1: Sotuv = 1000
  A2: Narx = ?
  A3: Daromad = A1 * A2

  Vazifa: Daromad = 50000 bo'lishi uchun Narx qancha?
  Data → What-If → Goal Seek:
    Set cell: A3
    To value: 50000
    By changing: A2

  Natija: A2 = 50 (Excel o'zi topadi)

3 ta stsenariy saqlash mumkin:

📉 Yomon stsenariy:
  Sotuv: 1000, Narx: 30, Bonus: 5%

➡️ Realistik:
  Sotuv: 1500, Narx: 35, Bonus: 7%

📈 Yaxshi:
  Sotuv: 2500, Narx: 40, Bonus: 10%

Tugmani bosib bittadan ko'rsatish mumkin

questions.question: Developer tab qanday yoqiladi?
questions.explanation: Developer tab — File → Options → Customize Ribbon → Developer.

questions.question: Goal Seek nima qiladi?
options: Maqsadli qiymatga erishish uchun input topadi
questions.explanation: Goal Seek — natija ma'lum, input topish uchun.

questions.question: Combo Box natijasi nima?
questions.explanation: Combo Box tanlanganda Cell Link ga raqam yozadi (1, 2, 3...).

questions.question: Bir nechta stsenariy saqlash uchun?
questions.explanation: Scenario Manager — bir nechta variantni saqlab, almashtirib turish uchun.

lessons.title: ChatGPT + Excel Automation
lessons.description: Sun'iy intellekt bilan Excel ishlarini avtomatlashtirish
topics: Ma'lumot tahlilini AI ga qildirib olish

content.text: ChatGPT — Excel'da formula yozish, VBA kod yaratish va ma'lumot tahlilini juda tezlashtiradi. To'g'ri prompt yozsangiz, soatlik ishni daqiqada bajaring.

content.code:
Yomon prompt:
  "Excel formula"

✅ Yaxshi prompt:
  "Excel formulasi yozing:
   - A ustunda mahsulot nomi
   - B ustunda summa
   - C ustunda sana
   - Bugundan boshlab oxirgi 7 kunlik
     'Olma' uchun jami summa kerak"

Natija:
  =SUMIFS(B:B, A:A, "Olma", C:C, ">="&TODAY()-7)

Prompt:
  "VBA kod yozing:
   - Aktiv sheetda A ustundagi takrorlanmas qiymatlarni
     yangi sheetga ko'chirish
   - Yangi sheet nomi: 'Unique_Data'
   - Agar sheet mavjud bo'lsa, qayta yaratish"

ChatGPT VBA kod yozib beradi va izoh qiladi.

1. Excel ma'lumotni CSV qilib eksport qiling
2. ChatGPT ga yuklang (yoki ko'chirib qo'ying)
3. So'rang:

   "Bu sotuv ma'lumotlarini tahlil qiling:
    - Top 5 mahsulot
    - Eng sotiluvchan oy
    - Trend qaysi tomonga
    - Tavsiyalar bering"

4. AI tahlil va xulosa beradi

content.text: ChatGPT bilan yaxshi promptlar yozish — bu yangi skill. Vaqt sarflab o'rganishga arziydi.

questions.question: Yaxshi prompt qanday bo'ladi?
questions.explanation: Yaxshi prompt — aniq vazifa, ma'lumot strukturasi, kutilayotgan natija.

questions.question: ChatGPT VBA kod yoza oladimi?
questions.explanation: ChatGPT VBA, Python, JavaScript va boshqa tillarda yoza oladi.

questions.question: Copilot nima?
questions.explanation: Copilot — Microsoft 365 ga integratsiyalashgan AI yordamchi.

lessons.title: VBA Basics
lessons.description: Visual Basic for Applications — Excel'ni dasturlash

content.text: VBA — Microsoft Office dasturlarini avtomatlashtirish uchun mo'ljallangan dasturlash tili. U bilan Excel'da har qanday narsani qilish mumkin.

content.code:
Ochish: Alt + F11

Tuzilishi:
  📁 Project Explorer (chap)
     ├── Sheet1
     ├── Sheet2
     ├── ThisWorkbook
     └── Modules
         └── Module1 ← Kod shu yerda

  📝 Code Window (o'rta) — kod yozish
  🔍 Properties (pastki chap) — sozlamalar
  ⚠️ Immediate Window (Ctrl+G) — debug

Sub HelloWorld()
    MsgBox "Salom, Excel!"
End Sub

' Ishga tushirish: F5
' Yoki Excelda: Alt+F8 → tanlash → Run

Range("A1").Value = 100
  → A1 ga 100 yozish

Range("A1:A10").Value = "Excel"
  → A1:A10 ga 'Excel' yozish

Cells(1, 1).Value = 50
  → A1 ga (qator 1, ustun 1)

Worksheets("Sheet1").Range("B5").Value = 200
  → Sheet1 ning B5 ga

ActiveSheet.Name = "Dashboard"
  → Joriy sheet nomini o'zgartirish

Sub Misol()
    Dim i As Integer
    Dim total As Double
    
    total = 0
    
    For i = 1 To 10
        total = total + Cells(i, 1).Value
    Next i
    
    If total > 1000 Then
        MsgBox "Ko'p: " & total
    Else
        MsgBox "Kam: " & total
    End If
End Sub

content.text: Macros saqlash uchun faylni .xlsm (Macro-Enabled Workbook) sifatida saqlang. Oddiy .xlsx makrosga ruxsat bermaydi!

questions.question: VBA Editor qanday ochiladi?
questions.explanation: Alt + F11 — VBA Editor (VBE) ni ochish uchun.

questions.question: Macros qanday formatda saqlanishi kerak?
questions.explanation: .xlsm — Macro-Enabled Workbook. .xlsx makrosni saqlamaydi.

questions.question: Range("A1").Value = 100 nima qiladi?
questions.explanation: Range obyekti .Value xususiyati orqali katakka qiymat yozadi.

questions.question: VBA da takrorlanish (loop) uchun?
questions.explanation: For loop — takrorlanuvchi amallar uchun (For ... Next).

questions.question: MsgBox nima qiladi?
questions.explanation: MsgBox — foydalanuvchiga ko'rinadigan dialog oyna.

lessons.title: Automated Reports
lessons.description: VBA bilan to'liq avtomatik hisobotlar tayyorlash

content.text: Bir marta yozilgan VBA kod har kuni, har hafta yoki har oyda avtomatik hisobot tayyorlay oladi.

content.code:
Sub MonthlyReport()
    Dim wsData As Worksheet
    Dim wsReport As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long
    
    ' 1. Data sheet ga murojaat
    Set wsData = Worksheets("Data")
    lastRow = wsData.Cells(Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    ' 2. Report sheet ni qayta yaratish
    On Error Resume Next
    Worksheets("Report").Delete
    On Error GoTo 0
    Set wsReport = Worksheets.Add
    wsReport.Name = "Report"
    
    ' 3. Sarlavha
    wsReport.Range("A1").Value = "OYLIK HISOBOT - " & Format(Date, "mmmm yyyy")
    wsReport.Range("A1").Font.Size = 16
    wsReport.Range("A1").Font.Bold = True
    
    ' 4. Asosiy ko'rsatkichlar
    wsReport.Range("A3").Value = "Jami sotuv:"
    wsReport.Range("B3").Value = WorksheetFunction.Sum(wsData.Range("D2:D" & lastRow))
    
    wsReport.Range("A4").Value = "Mijozlar soni:"
    wsReport.Range("B4").Value = WorksheetFunction.CountA(wsData.Range("B2:B" & lastRow))
    
    ' 5. Format
    wsReport.Range("B3:B4").NumberFormat = "#,##0 UZS"
    wsReport.Columns("A:B").AutoFit
    
    MsgBox "Hisobot tayyor!"
End Sub

Sub CreatePivot()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim pc As PivotCache
    Dim pt As PivotTable
    
    Set ws = ActiveSheet
    
    ' Pivot Cache
    Set pc = ActiveWorkbook.PivotCaches.Create( _
        SourceType:=xlDatabase, _
        SourceData:=ws.Range("A1").CurrentRegion)
    
    ' Pivot Table
    Set pt = pc.CreatePivotTable( _
        TableDestination:=ws.Range("F1"), _
        TableName:="MyPivot")
    
    ' Maydonlar
    pt.PivotFields("Mahsulot").Orientation = xlRowField
    pt.PivotFields("Summa").Orientation = xlDataField
End Sub

Sub ExportToPDF()
    Dim filePath As String
    filePath = ThisWorkbook.Path & "\Hisobot_" & Format(Date, "yyyy-mm-dd") & ".pdf"
    
    ActiveSheet.ExportAsFixedFormat _
        Type:=xlTypePDF, _
        Filename:=filePath, _
        Quality:=xlQualityStandard, _
        IncludeDocProperties:=True
    
    MsgBox "PDF saqlandi: " & filePath
End Sub

Sub SendReport()
    Dim outlook As Object
    Dim mail As Object
    
    Set outlook = CreateObject("Outlook.Application")
    Set mail = outlook.CreateItem(0)
    
    With mail
        .To = "boss@company.uz"
        .Subject = "Oylik hisobot"
        .Body = "Hurmatli rahbar, oylik hisobot ilova qilindi."
        .Attachments.Add ThisWorkbook.FullName
        .Send
    End With
    
    MsgBox "Email yuborildi!"
End Sub

content.text: Outlook avtomatik ochilishi va yuborilishi uchun kompyuterda o'rnatilgan va kirgan bo'lishi kerak.

questions.question: VBA dan PDF eksport uchun qaysi method?
questions.explanation: ExportAsFixedFormat orqali PDF va boshqa formatlarga eksport qilinadi.

questions.question: Outlook bilan ishlash uchun?
questions.explanation: Ikkala usul ham ishlaydi — Late Binding (CreateObject) yoki Early Binding (Reference).

questions.question: WorksheetFunction nima?
questions.explanation: WorksheetFunction orqali SUM, COUNT, VLOOKUP kabi Excel formulalarni VBA da ishlatish mumkin.

content.text: Endi siz Excel'da to'liq avtomatlashtirilgan biznes tizim yaratishingiz mumkin! Bu darsda barcha bilimlarni birlashtirib, real loyiha yaratamiz.

content.code:
Sub MyMacro()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    ' Asosiy kod
    Dim x As Double
    x = 10 / 0  ' Xato!
    
    Exit Sub  ' Muhim! ErrorHandler ga o'tmaslik uchun
    
ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "Xato: " & Err.Description, vbCritical
    Debug.Print "Xato kodi: " & Err.Number
End Sub

Sub FastMacro()
    ' Boshlanishida:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False    ' Ekran yangilanmaydi
    Application.Calculation = xlManual    ' Formulalar avtomatik hisoblanmaydi
    Application.EnableEvents = False      ' Eventlar o'chiriladi
    
    ' Asosiy kod
    ' ... katta hajmli ishlar
    
    ' Oxirida:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = xlAutomatic
    Application.EnableEvents = True
End Sub

→ 10x tezroq ishlaydi!

VBA Editor → Insert → UserForm

O'z formangizni yarating:
  • Label - matn
  • TextBox - kiritish
  • ComboBox - dropdown
  • CommandButton - tugma
  • CheckBox - belgi

Properties orqali tashqi ko'rinishni sozlang.
Kod:
  Private Sub btnSubmit_Click()
      Cells(1, 1).Value = TextBox1.Value
      Unload Me
  End Sub
  
Ko'rsatish:
  UserForm1.Show

content.text: Endi sizning vazifangiz — o'zingizning real biznes muammongiz uchun to'liq Excel yechim yaratish. Bu sizning portfolioingizdagi eng yaxshi loyiha bo'ladi!

questions.question: VBA da Performance uchun nima o'chiriladi?
questions.explanation: Tezlik uchun: ScreenUpdating, Calculation, Events - hammasini False yoki Manual qiling.

questions.question: Error Handling uchun qaysi?
questions.explanation: VBA da Error Handling — On Error GoTo Label.

questions.question: UserForm nima?
questions.explanation: UserForm — o'z interfeys oynangiz (custom dialog).

questions.question: Naming convention misoli?
questions.explanation: Prefix bilan ataylash: ws (worksheet), rng (range), int (integer), str (string).

questions.question: Yakuniy loyihaning eng muhim qismi?
questions.explanation: Eng yaxshi loyiha — real foydalanuvchi muammosini yechadigan loyiha!
